chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ زِيَارَةِ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 232 – Merits of the Ziyarah of Abu Abdullah Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/308)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (8/308)
text: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ أَتَى قَبْرَ الْحُسَيْنِ ( عليه السلام ) عَارِفاً بِحَقِّهِ كَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ أَجْرَ مَنْ أَعْتَقَ أَلْفَ نَسَمَةٍ وَ كَمَنْ حَمَلَ عَلَى أَلْفِ فَرَسٍ مُسْرَجَةٍ مُلْجَمَةٍ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Muhammad Bin Sadaqa, from Salih Al Nayli who said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who goes to the grave of Al-Husayn<sup>asws</sup> recognising his<sup>asws</sup> right, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> would Write for him the Recompense of freeing a thousand people, and he would be like the one who readies a thousand horses with saddles and reins in the Way of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Muhammad ibn al-Husayn has narrated from Muhammad ibn Sinan from Muhammad ibn Sadaqah from Salih al-Niliy who has said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, Tor one who visits the grave of al-Husayn, ‘Alayhi al- Salam, with proper understanding of his rights, Allah writes for him the reward for setting free of one thousand persons. It is like readying one thousand horses fully harnessed to join the battle for the cause of Allah.”’
